name: 数据分布
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Probability
curriculum_points: 6.SP.2 Understand that a set of data collected to answer a statistical question has a distribution which can be described by its center, spread, and overall shape.
6.SP.3 Recognize that a measure of center for a numerical data set summarizes all of its values with a single number, while a measure of variation describes how its values vary with a single number.
6.SP.4 Display numerical data in plots on a number line, including dot plots, histograms, and box plots.

6.SP.5 Summarize numerical data sets in relation to their context, such as by: a. Reporting the number of observations. b. Describing the nature of the attribute under investigation, including how it was measured and its units of measurement. c. Giving quantitative measures of center (median and/or mean) and variability (interquartile range and/or mean absolute deviation), as well as describing any overall pattern and any striking deviations from the overall pattern with reference to the context in which the data were gathered. d. Relating the choice of measures of center and variability to the shape of the data distribution and the context.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「数据分布」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.SP.2 Understand that a set of data collected to answer a statistical question has a distribution which can be describe…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：6.SP.3 Recognize that a measure of center for a numerical data set summarizes al… 对理解「数据分布」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
